# 🌸 SKZ Bucket List Scrapbook 💖

A cute scrapbook-inspired Stray Kids fan website built using **HTML, CSS, and JavaScript**.

This project combines a personal bucket list,
SKZ-themed polaroid gallery, photo booth ideas, music, and aesthetic scrapbook elements into one interactive website.
